vocab.meaning: hiệu suất nhận thức đỉnh cao
vocab.example: I prefer the morning because that is when I reach my peak cognitive performance for complex tasks.
My circadian rhythm is naturally geared toward being an early bird, making morning study sessions very productive.

vocab.meaning: sự tỉnh táo về trí não
vocab.example: There is a significant boost in my mental alertness right after my first cup of coffee in the AM.

vocab.meaning: sự mệt mỏi/uể oải vào buổi chiều
vocab.example: I avoid studying at 3 PM because I often fall victim to the dreaded afternoon slump.
By tackling difficult subjects early, I reap the benefits of a clear and refreshed mind.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: The crack of dawn provides a period of uninterrupted focus before the rest of the world wakes up.
I have experimented with different schedules and found that late mornings offer me optimal productivity.

vocab.meaning: sự mệt mỏi về tinh thần
vocab.example: By the afternoon, mental fatigue usually sets in, making it harder to retain new information.
My brain seems to absorb information like a sponge during the quiet hours of the morning.
I like to get the most daunting tasks out of the way before noon so I can relax later.
